properties.dose: Oral Light: 20-30mg Common: 30-50mg Strong: 50-70mg | Insufflated Light: 10-15mg Common: 15-25mg Strong: 25-35mg+ | Vapourized Light: 10-15mg Common: 15-25mg Strong: 25-35mg
properties.duration: Oral: 3-5 hours. | Insufflated: 2-3 hours. | Vapourized: 1 hour.
properties.onset: Oral: 20-30 minutes. | Insufflated: 5-15 minutes. | Vapourized: 1-2 minutes.
properties.summary: A pyrovalerone stimulant related to a-PVP and naphyrone. There is limited information about the drugs effects and safety profile. There is little evidence of human use of this drug.
